article.title: EU forced to exempt banned Chinese chipmaker after auto industry warns of supply crisis — European car factories warn of imminent supply chain collapse
article.summary: The European Commission is preparing to propose a temporary exemption for a Chinese semiconductor manufacturer from the EU's 20th Russia sanctions package.
article.title_zh: 歐盟被迫豁免遭禁中國晶片製造商 產業警告供應鏈危機——歐洲車廠警告面臨迫在眉睫的供應鏈崩潰
article.summary_zh: 歐盟委員會準備提議對一家中國半導體製造商提供臨時豁免，將其從第 20 份俄羅斯制裁方案中豁除。

article.title: AI Debt Boom Sparks Warnings
article.summary: Danielle Poli, Managing Director and Co-Portfolio Manager of Global Credit at Oaktree Capital Management joined Bloomberg Open Interest to break down the hidden risks behind the AI boom, why higher interest rates may be here longer than markets expect, and where investors are still finding 8–10% yields. She warns that massive AI debt issuance could create future cracks in credit markets, especially in private credit and leveraged loans. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: AI 債務繁榮引發警告
article.summary_zh: Oaktree Capital Management 董事總經理兼全球信用共同投資組合經理 Danielle Poli 在 Bloomberg Open Interest 上分析了 AI 繁榮背後的隱藏風險、為何利率可能會更長期高於預期，以及投資者在哪裡仍能找到 8–10% 的收益。

article.title: EU Seeks to Lift Ban on Chinese Chips It Barred Only Weeks Ago
article.summary: The European Union will propose temporarily lifting sanctions on a major Chinese semiconductor supplier after automakers warned of impending supply chain chaos if the ban isn’t removed.
article.title_zh: 歐盟尋求解除對其數週前禁止的中國晶片的禁令
article.summary_zh: 歐盟將提議臨時解除對主要中國半導體供應商的制裁，此前汽車製造商警告如果不解除禁令將面臨供應鏈混亂。

article.title: Anthropic’s New Consulting Venture Makes Its First Acquisition
article.summary: The new artificial intelligence enterprise services firm backed by Blackstone Inc., Anthropic PBC and Hellman & Friedman has picked a San Francisco firm called Fractional AI as the operational centerpiece of the as-yet unnamed venture.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 新諮詢事業公司完成首次收購
article.summary_zh: 由 Blackstone Inc.、Anthropic PBC 和 Hellman & Friedman 支持的新 AI 企業服務公司選擇舊金山公司 Fractional AI 作為該尚未命名事業的運營中心。

article.title: Open-source non-profit claims Bambu Lab violated license — SFC steps in after multi-billion dollar 3D printer giant threatened independent developer, issued cease-and-desist demand on OrcaSlicer fork that restored cloud printing features
article.summary: The SFC says that including proprietary code alongside software under AGPLv3 breaks the open-source license, and that Bambu Lab has been doing this for years.
article.title_zh: 開源非營利組織聲稱 Bambu Lab 違反許可協議 — SFC 介入，數十億美元 3D 印表機巨頭威脅獨立開發者，對恢復雲列印功能的 OrcaSlicer 分支發送停止函
article.summary_zh: SFC 指出 Bambu Lab 將專有代碼與 AGPLv3 授權軟體一起發布違反開源許可，該公司多年來一直在這樣做。

article.title: Samsung reportedly set to distribute up to $26.6 billion to staff in AI-driven semiconductor bonuses after last-minute union deal — average payouts could approach $400,000 per chip employee
article.summary: Samsung Electronics is reportedly preparing to distribute up to 40 trillion won ($26.6 billion) in semiconductor employee bonuses after reaching a last-minute labor agreement. The proposed deal ties payouts to AI-driven chip profits and could see average employee bonuses approach $400,000.
article.title_zh: Samsung 據報將向員工發放高達 266 億美元 AI 驅動晶片獎金 在工會協議達成後——平均單位獎金可高達 40 萬美元
article.summary_zh: Samsung Electronics 據報將在達成勞資協議後，向員工發放高達 40 兆韓元（266 億美元）的半導體獎金，平均員工獎金可達 40 萬美元。

article.title: Building the agentic agreement enterprise: How developers are unlocking agentic experiences with Docusign’s MCP server and platform
article.summary: Managing agreements across the enterprise has traditionally been a slow, manual process. Docusign for Developers has accelerated the process through automation of tedious steps, but the infusion of agentic AI promises to further speed agreement management, transforming it into an agile, seamless, and high-velocity workflow. At Momentum 2026 , Docusign’s annual customer conference, Docusign is pushing this boundary with key releases for developers: the Docusign MCP Server, the Agreement Manager API, IAM Toolkit, and a revamped Developer Console. The MCP server: Making agreements agent-ready A primary challenge for AI agents within the enterprise is the generalist nature of LLM platforms. While remarkably capable, they frequently lack the specialized, domain-specific institutional memo
article.title_zh: 構建代理協議企業：開發人員如何通過 Docusign 的 MCP 伺服器解鎖代理體驗
article.summary_zh: 企業協議管理傳統上是緩慢的手動流程，Docusign for Developers 通過自動化加速了該過程，而代理 AI 的融合承諾進一步加快協議管理，將其轉變為敏捷無縫的體驗。

article.title: AI is starting to out-design chip engineers in narrow areas as LLMs accelerate software chip design tool development — "There is still a lot of human guidance" says Berkley researcher
article.summary: We interview researchers and chip design experts to explore where and how AI is being used during the process, and what trials and tribulations come alongside the usage of the nascent technology in their workflows.
article.title_zh: AI 開始在特定領域超越晶片工程師，LLM 加速軟體晶片設計工具開發 — Berkeley 研究員表示「仍需大量人工指導」
article.summary_zh: 我們採訪了研究人員和晶片設計專家，探討 AI 在晶片設計流程中的應用位置、方式，以及這項新興技術帶來的試煉與挑戰。

article.title: Save 30% on a 12-month Proton Unlimited VPN sub to secure an all-in-one privacy suite for under $110 — big price drop on service that includes a no-logs VPN with servers in 145 countries, 500GB of cloud storage, encrypted mail, password manager, and more
article.summary: Grab a 30% saving on a 12 month subscription to Proton Unlimited for a limited time only.
article.title_zh: Proton Unlimited VPN 12 個月訂閱優惠 30% 享受全功能隱私套件，不到 $110 — 涵蓋無日誌 VPN、145 國伺服器、500GB 雲端儲存、加密郵件、密碼管理器等功能的大幅折扣
article.summary_zh: 限時優惠，Proton Unlimited 12 個月訂閱享受 30% 折扣。

article.title: Imec Says AI Scaling Needs More Orchestration Across Research, Design, Manufacturing
article.summary: I love it when tech leaders use simple analogies to illustrate the complexity and scale of what the semiconductor industry is facing right now. A strong example came during the opening keynote by imec CEO
article.title_zh: Imec 表示 AI 擴展需要跨研究、設計、製造的更多協調

article.title: Why enterprise AI keeps stalling — and how data streaming could unlock it
article.summary: Enterprise AI is running into a problem. But it has more to do with data infrastructure than model quality. The snag is that most businesses still keep data fragmented across databases, SaaS tools, warehouses, and internal platforms, with security controls layered on top to protect each surface area separately.  That works fine in a batch world, but it becomes a serious constraint once agents and AI applications have to reason across live business data, Sean Falconer , head of AI at data streaming platform Confluent, tells The New Stack. “Most AI projects fail before they even reach a single customer because the data layer breaks down,”   Falconer says. “Teams have the models and mandate, but security risks and fragmented data stop them from shipping.” Con
article.title_zh: 為什麼企業 AI 不斷停滯——數據流處理如何能解鎖它
article.summary_zh: 企業 AI 遇到的問題主要源於數據基礎設施而非模型質量，因為大多數企業的數據仍然分散在各個數據庫、SaaS 工具和倉庫中。

article.title: SpaceX Challenges AI Rivals For Control of $26.5 Trillion AI Market
article.summary: Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and AI company is effectively basing its pitch for the biggest IPO in history on the idea that it can capture a huge share of the market from the likes of OpenAI, Anthropic PBC and Alphabet Inc.’s AI systems: technology that will eventually automate large swaths of white-collar and administrative work, creating a massive market for software that can perform digital tasks traditionally handled by humans. Nancy Tengler, Laffer Tengler Investments joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the flurry of IPO's. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: SpaceX 挑戰 AI 對手爭奪 26.5 萬億美元 AI 市場控制權
article.summary_zh: Elon Musk 的火箭、衛星和 AI 公司在歷史性規模最大 IPO 中的核心論點是它可以從 OpenAI、Anthropic 等 AI 系統廠商手中奪取巨大市場份額。

article.title: Pentagon Tests Rival AI Models in Race to Replace Anthropic
article.summary: The Pentagon is testing artificial intelligence models to see which are most favored by 25 of the department’s “power users,” as the US military races to find alternatives to Anthropic PBC’s Claude, according to a senior defense official.
article.title_zh: 五角大樓測試競爭AI模型 競賽替代Anthropic
article.summary_zh: 五角大樓正測試人工智能模型，以確定25名國防部「權力用戶」最青睞的模型，美國軍方競相尋找Anthropic PBC的Claude替代品。

article.title: Google just tested a bunch of new AI models for Android app coding – here are the rankings
article.summary: Google has once again updated its “Android Bench” rankings for the best AI models for Android app development, with a bunch of new “open-weight” models as well as more details on the tokens used and cost of using these models. more…
article.title_zh: Google為Android應用編碼測試了一批新AI模型 – 以下是排名
article.summary_zh: Google再次更新其「Android Bench」排名，評比Android應用開發的最佳AI模型，包括多個新的「開放權重」模型及更多Token和成本詳情。
